# HydrAI Labs

> HydrAI Labs is an AI automation agency for local businesses in Costa del Sol, Málaga and Marbella (Spain). We design, build and maintain AI-powered systems that capture leads, automate customer service and free local business owners from repetitive operational work.

## What we do

- Build WhatsApp chatbots that respond to customers 24/7 in multiple languages.
- Build AI agents that qualify leads, book appointments and follow up automatically.
- Build n8n automations that connect WhatsApp, CRMs, email, calendars and internal tools.
- Build SEO-optimized websites and landing pages for local businesses.
- Build AI-powered lead capture and lead routing systems.
- Audit existing operations and identify automation opportunities.

## Locations served

- Costa del Sol (Spain)
- Málaga
- Marbella
- Estepona
- Fuengirola
- Benalmádena
- Torremolinos
- Mijas
- Remote across Spain and Europe.

## Target clients

- Restaurants, bars and hospitality venues.
- Aesthetic clinics, dental clinics, wellness and beauty centers.
- Real estate agencies and property management companies.
- Hotels, boutique hotels and short-term rental operators.
- Gyms, CrossFit boxes and sports centers.
- Local SMEs, consultants and professional services.

## Main offers

- Free AI Audit: a no-cost diagnostic of automation opportunities for any local business.
- WhatsApp chatbot implementations starting at €297/month.
- Custom AI agents for sales, support and operations.
- Full automation systems built on n8n + WhatsApp Business + CRM + AI.

## Key facts (quotable)

- HydrAI Labs is an AI automation agency for local businesses in Costa del Sol.
- HydrAI Labs builds WhatsApp chatbots, AI agents, n8n automations and lead capture systems.
- HydrAI Labs works with restaurants, clinics, hotels, real estate agencies and local SMEs.
- HydrAI Labs offers a free AI audit for businesses.
- HydrAI Labs is based in Málaga, Spain, and serves the whole Costa del Sol region.
- HydrAI Labs implementations typically deploy in 5 to 10 business days.
